telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 12, 2026 Markets absorbed another inflation surprise as hot CPI data triggered a hawkish Fed repricing, pushing yields higher and forcing risk assets to contend with late-cycle dynamics. The persistent price pressures are shifting the narrative from goldilocks growth toward stagflation concerns, even as expansion momentum holds. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $80,664 · ETH: $2,284 · SOL: $94.7 · GOLD: $4,714 · SPY: $738.18 (+0.1%) · QQQ: $707.24 (-0.6%) · VIX: $17.99 (-2.1%) · TLT: $84.99 (-1.3%) · DXY: $98.32 (+0.4%) · OIL: $102.05 (+4.1%) EVENING NEWS ▲ Bond Bears Reload Fed Rate Hike Wagers on Stubborn Inflation ▲ Taiwan: Mild tightening path revised – DBS ▲ Bitcoin Suisse Expands Global Footprint with Regulatory Approvals in Bermuda ▲ Forex Today: Hot US CPI boosts US Dollar as Treasury yields climb ▼ Fed: Neutral stance as inflation stabilizes – TD Securities ▲ Cantor8 Doubles Down on Africa, Targeting Mobile Money Growth Through Yiksi Limited SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Fed repricing and Asian tightening signal mature cycle dynamics ▼ Goldilocks: Hot inflation data undermines soft landing narrative ▲ Stagflation: Persistent inflation despite growth concerns gaining traction ▲ Displacement: Continued crypto and fintech infrastructure buildout REGIME CHECK ▲ Risk-On · Neutral · EXPANSION · Gauge: 36.5/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index (Final)(May) — May 22, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: 48.2) National Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 21, 11:30 PM UTC (prev: 1.5%) EU Markit Manufacturing Purchasing Managers Index (Preliminary)(May) — May 21, 08:00 AM UTC (prev: 52.2) Seasonally adjusted unemployment rate(Apr) — May 21, 01:30 AM UTC (prev: 4.3%) EU Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Final)(Apr) — May 20, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 3.0%) EU Consumer Price Index (MoM)(Final)(Apr) — May 20, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 1.0%) CONTRARIAN • Market may be overreacting to single CPI print while Fed maintains measured approach • Asian tightening could prove more supportive for regional currencies than feared agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
